nodes.title: Render Login Form
nodes.description: When user navigates to /login, render form with username, password, submit button, error message area, and register link. Username input has autocomplete='username'. Password input has eye icon toggle and is controlled through showPassword signal.

nodes.title: Toggle Login Password Visibility
nodes.description: When user clicks login eye icon button, toggle showPassword signal. When true password field type becomes 'text'; when false it becomes 'password'.

nodes.title: Validate Login Fields
nodes.description: When user clicks submit, ensure username and password are not empty. Success: proceed to submit-login-credentials. Failure: set error message 'يرجى إدخال اسم المستخدم وكلمة المرور' and keep form enabled.

nodes.title: Submit Login Credentials
nodes.description: After validation passes, set isLoading=true, call auth.login(username, password) which POSTS to /api/auth/login. Success: persist token/user in auth service/localStorage, clear error, navigate to /businesses. Failure: set server error (e.g., invalid credentials) in error signal. Finally: isLoading=false.

nodes.title: Navigate To Register
nodes.description: When user clicks 'إنشاء حساب جديد' on login form, navigate to /register route using RouterLink. No API call.

nodes.title: Render Register Form
nodes.description: When user navigates to /register, render form with fullName, username, password, role selector, submit button, link to login, and error message area.

nodes.title: Toggle Register Password Visibility
nodes.description: When user clicks register eye icon button, toggle showPassword signal. When true: type='text'; when false: type='password'.

nodes.title: Validate Register Fields
nodes.description: When user submits registration, trim username/fullName and validate password length >= 6. Failure: set error 'يرجى تعبئة جميع الحقول المطلوبة' or 'كلمة المرور يجب أن تكون 6 أحرف على الأقل'. Success: continue to submit-register-form.

nodes.title: Submit Register Form
nodes.description: After validation, set isLoading=true and clear error, then call auth.register(username, password, fullName, role). Success: clear loading and navigate to /login. Failure: set error message (server error or 'فشل إنشاء الحساب'). Finally: isLoading=false.

nodes.title: Navigate To Login From Register
nodes.description: When user clicks login link on register page, navigate to /login route using RouterLink.

nodes.title: Redirect If Authenticated
nodes.description: When user visits /login or /register and already has valid token, redirect to /businesses. Uses loginGuard. No API call; checks auth service state.
